freeDeliverablesSection.title: What Do You Get Free — Before Paying a Single Rupee?
freeDeliverablesSection.description: After one phone consultation, you receive five professional deliverables free: a 2D layout plan, 3D design renders of your key rooms, a Scope of Work (SOW) document, a materials and brands plan, and 2–3 design theme options.

items.title: 2D layout plan
items.description: Furniture placement, circulation space, and storage mapped on your floor plan, so you see exactly what fits where.

items.title: 3D design renders
items.description: Realistic views of your living room, kitchen, and bedrooms in your chosen theme, so you judge the design, not a promise.

items.title: Scope of Work document
items.description: Every task listed: false ceiling, electrical points, carpentry, painting. No "we'll see later" items.

items.title: Materials & brands plan
items.description: Which plywood grade, which laminate, which hardware brand goes into each unit, written down before you commit.

items.title: Itemized cost sheet
items.description: Every line priced separately, with a good/better/best option on each, so you control the budget item by item.

whyFree.text: Because we believe you should hire a designer after seeing their thinking, not before. One phone call is all it takes to start.
